message:
test(agent-drivers): add work-detection and generateSecureId unit tests (bd-1vr1.9)

Add 46 tests covering pattern-based work detection (tool calling, thinking,
idle, rate limiting, context warnings, agent-type filtering, confidence scoring)
and cryptographic ID generation (format, uniqueness, charset distribution).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
